title: Gorilla Filler Plasterboard & Drywall Mesh Tape | Fills Cracks - Easy to Apply (Self Adhesive) | 50mm x 50m (White, 50m)
features: STRONG PLASTERBOARD TAPE: This durable white tape reinforces repairs and prevents cracks from reappearing, ideal for long-lasting wall restoration in homes, offices, and rentals.
EASY TO APPLY: With its adhesive backing, the tape sticks firmly to walls, making it quick to position before adding plaster or filler for walls, saving time on repairs.
IDEAL FOR WALL REPAIRS: Perfect for use with a wall repair kit, this mesh tape creates a strong bond between surfaces, ensuring cracks are filled and smoothed over with ease.
LONG 50M ROLL: At 50mm wide and 50m long, this plasterboard tape is excellent for covering large areas or multiple repairs, reducing the need for frequent replacements.
FINE WHITE MESH: The lightweight mesh blends easily into the surface once covered with wall filler or plaster, leaving a flawless finish that’s ready for painting or wallpapering.
STOPS CRACKS RETURNING: Designed to strengthen joints and seams, this gorilla tape prevents repaired areas from reopening, giving lasting peace of mind.
SUITABLE FOR DIY & TRADE: Whether it’s part of a home renovation or a professional decorating job, this plasterboard tape delivers reliable, high-quality results every time.
MULTI-SURFACE USE: Works on plasterboard, drywall, and other wall types, making it a versatile addition to any wall repair kit or decorating toolbox.

RENOVATION ESSENTIAL: Whether updating a spare room or renovating a whole property, this gorilla tape strengthens every joint and seam. Ideal for high-traffic areas like hallways or kitchens where walls are more likely to suffer knocks and cracks.

IDEAL FOR RENTAL PROPERTIES: Landlords and tenants can use this white tape to tackle wear-and-tear damage before moving out or in. Paired with a wall repair kit, it helps restore walls to a clean, smooth condition, making them ready for fresh paint or wallpaper.
description: Repairing walls doesn’t have to be difficult – with Gorilla Filler Plasterboard & Drywall Mesh Tape, it’s quick, strong, and long-lasting. Designed to fill cracks and reinforce repairs, this durable white tape is ideal for use with any wall repair kit or filler for walls. Measuring 50mm wide and 50m long, it covers large areas with ease, making it perfect for both small touch-ups and big projects. The strong adhesive backing allows for easy application – simply press onto the crack or joint and cover with plaster or wall filler for a smooth, professional finish. The fine mesh design blends seamlessly into the wall and once plaster or fille rha been applied it ensures a flawless result that’s ready for painting or decorating. Suitable for plasterboard, drywall, and a variety of surfaces, this gorilla tape for walls is the reliable choice for keeping walls looking their best.
